subject: chemistry
title: 18N.1.HL.TZ0.27
question_html:
An indicator, HIn, has a pKa of 5.1.

HIn (aq)  ⇌ H+ (aq) + In− (aq)

colour A                      colour B

Which statement is correct?

 

A.   At pH = 7, colour B would be observed
B.   At pH = 3, colour B would be observed
C.   At pH = 7, [HIn] = [In−]
D.   At pH = 3, [HIn] < [In−]
